query: severely underexposed dark photo crushed shadows black murky
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — severe underexposure, crushed shadows, dark murky atmosphere, mood-driven black tones

response.objective_caption: A person stands indoors facing away from the camera, with both hands raised to cover their head. The individual wears a sleeveless dark top. Behind the figure, light falls through a rectangular vertical opening onto a wooden floor. The person's upper arms, hands, and portions of their back and hair are visible, while the surrounding walls and much of the room fade into darkness.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A grainy black-and-white analog photograph showing a person standing in a near-pitch-dark interior with both hands covering their face and head in a gesture of anguish. Heavy film grain textures the entire frame, while extreme underexposure swallows most of the scene in crushed black shadows. Only the subject's arms, hands, and part of their back catch light from a distant rectangular opening, and the overwhelming darkness, distressed posture, and oppressive mood combine to evoke dread and emotional suffering.
